channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti on back of road sign, 1st May
item.description:
This is a second example - the other has now been closed (thank you)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 150, Kennington Park Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven kerb, 1st May
item.description:
Sunken kerb, uneven with early footpath damage
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Sparrow Drive, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Raised pavements, 1st May
item.description:
There is a tree outside number 64 that I making the pavements raised and is a trip hazard. The tree has been reported before and nothing has been done about it
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blithdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pile of bin bags not picked up, 1st May
item.description:
A pile of bin bagged were reported to be fly tipped but it looks like they have not all been taken. There is still a substantial pile of bin bags outside of churchward house.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Road, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Drawers & r Of Drawers & Old kitchen cupboard, 1st May
item.description:
These items have been dumped near to and opposite 12&13 Fordyce Road Renovation work being carried out next door to 12.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Fordyce Road, Hither Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish bag, 1st May
item.description:
Dumped rubbish bag on top of the electrical exchange box
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cumberland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 8 Anson Rd, 1st May
item.description:
Pls collect these bags

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anson Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Corner of meadowbank and Ainger road NW3, 1st May
item.description:
Vast amount of lime bikes in the way!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ainger Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on wall, 1st May
item.description:
Located on the path that leads to the railway crossing

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich High Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress & Bed Base Fly Tipped on Hubbard Road, 1st May
item.description:
Single bed base and mattress left on the pavement next to the road sign for Hubbard Road where it joins Auckland Hill

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Hubbard Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Oil container spillage, 1st May
item.description:
Dumped container saying "Oil" on it, spilled over the road, container is on the footpath, quite a big container, bigger than domestic. Could pose a risk for drivers.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Traffic lights required at William Barefoot Drive junction Green Lane for safety of pedestrians and vehicular traffic. N.B. Thank you for your email regarding traffic lights at a junction. Traffic Lights maintained by TFL. You would need to contact TFL for this request., 1st May
item.description:
Traffic lights required at William Barefoot Drive junction Green Lane for safety of pedestrians and vehicular traffic. N.B. Thank you for your email regarding traffic lights at a junction. Traffic Lights maintained by TFL. You would need to contact TFL for this request.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwood Road, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lorrimore square and Fleming road, 1st May
item.description:
Bin store door does not shut or lock

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lorrimore Square, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Black bags etc flytipped, 1st May
item.description:
Please check and remove. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 66, Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken bollard, 1st May
item.description:
Please remove. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Petersham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown tree 77 Redwald Road, 1st May
item.description:
The tree is far too tall for the small gardens and surrounding houses on this estate. It blocks light to 75 Redwald Road, is overhanging in number 79, blocking light and windows in houses on both sides and feels like a safety risk.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Redwald Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: See map, 1st May
item.description:
Fly tip

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plympton Avenue, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Abandoned crashed car with fake plates, 1st May
item.description:
This car has been here parked in the same place for around a week. It is badly damaged and has at least one completely flat tyre. When I check the number on the dvla there is nothing returned so the plates are fake. Presume stolen and dumped.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Belsham Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sycamore tree between several properties. Dying?, 1st May
item.description:
Mature Sycamore showing signs of dieback. No foliage on 2 or maybe 3 trunks. I am unsure whose property it is on - looks to be on the border. I am pensioner so beyond my means to attend to this problem.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Upland Road, Blendon, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Barrier Planter outside Grazebrook Primary Schooll,defaced, 1st May
item.description:
Large printed poster claiming the Mayor has betrayed a vulnerable child has been fixed to the Barrier Planter. It is important that this is removed before further graffiti is added and a cycle of neglect takes hold

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Grayling Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
